title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS OF THE UMPQUA VALLEY HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Club Members are encouraged to increase their daily physical activity by exercising, and participating in team sports. 1144 NE Cedar Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 (grades 1-12) Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 440-9505 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 440-9505 Main phone Main phone (541) 440-9505 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $52 annual membership fee ($26 per year for scholarship recipients). Additional fees may apply. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
